DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DANIEL DENENBERG, ESQ., 925.943.6650, FOR PLAINTIFF GUDRUN JACOBSEN.
RYAN MAU, ESQ., 415.362.9300, FOR DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECRIC COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled. Given the requirement to accept the pleaded facts, however improbable, Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to state a cause of action under White v. Southern California Edison Co. (1994) 25 Cal.App. 442. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
